feedback.text: I support the goals of the Digital Fairness Act, especially the focus on protecting consumers from unfair digital practices. I also want to mention an issue that I think should be included: the loss of access to games after purchase. Ive bought games at full price that I can no longer play because they were taken offline or shut down by the developers. It would be fair to have some basic rules to protect players in these situations.Games are a big part of the digital market now, and this would help make things more fair for consumers.
